infoBox.displayName: Items from different branches are paired together when the fields below match. If paired, the rest of the fields are compared to determine whether the items are the same or different

mix.description: Output uses different inputs for different fields

includeBoth.description: Output contains all data (but structure more complex)

fuzzyCompare.description: Whether to tolerate small type differences when comparing fields. E.g. the number 3 and the string '3' are treated as the same.

skipFields.description: Fields that shouldn't be included when checking whether two items are the same

fuzzyCompare.description: Whether to tolerate small type differences when comparing fields. E.g. the number 3 and the string '3' are treated as the same.

disableDotNotation.description: Whether to disallow referencing child fields using `parent.child` in the field name

first.description: Only ever output a single item per match

all.description: Output multiple items if there are multiple matches
